context: Evaluates whether the agent imports the package (not individual rules), avoids redundant aliases, and places all imports before any rules.

checklist.name: Imports the package, not individual rules
checklist.description: The authz policy uses `import data.lib.jwt` and calls `jwt.decode_claims(...)` — not `import data.lib.jwt.decode_claims` (which imports an individual rule)

checklist.name: No redundant aliases
checklist.description: The import does not alias the package to the same name it already has (e.g. not `import data.lib.jwt as jwt`)

checklist.name: All imports before rules
checklist.description: All `import` statements appear at the top of the file, before any `default` or rule declarations

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
